requirements.title: A vao_tools.py module ships the four verification tools
Review-evidence schema is bumped to v7
All three pipeline skills document Phase 0.5 oracle-derivation
common-pipeline-conventions documents Layer 4 run-history shape detection
The pipeline-completion-audit hook enforces VAO verdicts
Synthetic-fixture suite asserts each known failure is blocked
Structural tests assert the v2.0.0 framework is wired

reuse_decisions.anchor: skills/verified-agent-output/SKILL.md — new canonical home for the VAO framework; existing common-pipeline-conventions and team-spawning-and-review-gates would be bloated past tractability if VAO's ~600 lines were embedded there

agents/oracle-deriver.md — no existing agent has the read-the-oracle-and-produce-canonical-spec role; closest analogs (interaction-intuiter, route-mapper) cover narrower domains; v2.1.x candidate to refactor interaction-intuiter into a specialization of oracle-deriver
agents/adversarial-reviewer.md — no existing reviewer has the shape-paired adversarial mandate; complementary to task-reviewer (which verifies correctness), not substitutable
hooks/vao_tools.py — no existing tool produces deterministic verdict JSON for these four shapes; follows the existing module-not-hook pattern of review_evidence_schema.py
hooks/review_evidence_schema.py — schema bump v6 → v7 follows the precedent of v0.9.5 / v0.9.13 / v0.9.19 schema bumps; single source of truth for evidence contract
hooks/pipeline-completion-audit.py — existing Stop hook for incomplete-run termination is the right place for the VAO verdict enforcement; same exit semantics
skills/architect-team-pipeline/SKILL.md — Phase 0.5 inserted between existing Phase 0 and Phase 1; same pattern as v0.9.22's Phase −2 insertion
skills/bug-fix-pipeline/SKILL.md — analogous insertions at B0.5 / B3 / B−1
skills/mini-architect-team-pipeline/SKILL.md — analogous insertions at M0.5 / M5 / M0 (mini collapses adversarial pairing to mini-qa)
skills/team-spawning-and-review-gates/SKILL.md — new ## VAO task-shape pairing section; manifest v2 schema bump (adds vao_task_shape + vao_adversarial_role)

skills/common-pipeline-conventions/SKILL.md — new ## Run-history shape detection (v2.0.0) section; same cross-cutting-discipline pattern as the existing dispatch-mode / notifications / MemPalace sections
commands/{architect-team,bug-fix,mini}.md — add --no-vao flag alongside the existing --no-commit / --no-push / --no-compact / --proposal-first / --no-refine / --no-worktree / --no-teams flags
tests/test_verified_agent_output.py + tests/fixtures/vao/ — each new layer needs structural tests; the synthetic-fixture suite IS the test-suite-enforced layer the user named
Worktree-per-teammate dispatch — Layer 3's verify-baseline-clean solves the same problem at lower complexity; revisit in v2.x+ only if Layer 3 proves insufficient (no evidence it will)
Real-world replay on archived run transcripts — v2.0.0 acceptance bar is the synthetic-fixture suite; archived-run replay is a v2.1.x capability
MemPalace mining of .architect-team/run-history/ — Layer 4 reads from disk; MemPalace integration is a v2.1.x extension
Multi-codebase oracle synthesis (one oracle covering several codebases) — v2.0.0 supports one oracle per requirement; multi-codebase oracle is a v2.1.x extension

front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — documentation + structural-test change. The plugin's PRODUCT (the pipeline that the plugin drives) gains stronger Playwright discipline via Layer 3 verify-every-element, but the plugin's OWN test surface is pytest. No live dev API surface in the plugin itself.
